capture_conditions.notes: Source: TTB Public COLA Registry, TTB ID 20072001000036. TTB COLA composite artwork. Brewer: Calvert Brewing Company, LLC. Re-design of 7th State Golden Lager (cf. lbl-0005). Image is the unrolled label artwork as submitted to TTB (not a photograph of a physical container); front.jpg and back.jpg are duplicates of the same composite. Capture conditions matrix in SPEC §0.5 not directly applicable.

label_spec.name_address: Brewed and canned by Calvert Brewing Company, Upper Marlboro, MD.
label_spec.health_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
